languages.text: Один из самых прославленных орденов Адептус Астартес. Мастера молниеносных мощных ударов, космические десантники этого легиона являются лучшими штурмовыми единицами Империума. Божественная ярость, дарованная этим Астартес прародителем, превращает ударные войска ордена в истинных ангелов мщения, безжалостно истребляющих врагов Империума.

One of the most illustrious Chapters in the Adeptus Astartes. Masters of lightning-fast, powerful attacks, the Astartes of this legion are the elite strike force of the Imperium. The divine fury bestowed upon these Astartes by their progenitor transforms the Chapter's assault troops into true angels of vengeance, mercilessly crushing the enemies of the Imperium.
languages.original_text: Один из самых прославленных орденов Адептус Астартес. Мастера молниеносных мощных ударов, космические десантники этого легиона являются лучшими штурмовыми единицами Империума. The divine fury bestowed upon these Astartes by their progenitor transforms the Chapter's assault troops into true angels of vengeance, mercilessly crushing the enemies of the Imperium.

One of the most illustrious Chapters in the Adeptus Astartes. Masters of lightning-fast, powerful attacks, the Astartes of this legion are the elite strike force of the Imperium. The divine fury bestowed upon these Astartes by their progenitor transforms the Chapter's assault troops into true angels of vengeance, mercilessly crushing the enemies of the Imperium.

One of the most illustrious Chapters in the Adeptus Astartes. Masters of lightning-fast, powerful attacks, the Astartes of this legion are the elite strike force of the Imperium. The divine fury bestowed upon these Astartes by their progenitor transforms the Chapter's assault troops into true angels of vengeance, mercilessly crushing the enemies of the Imperium.

languages.text: Uno de los capítulos más ilustres del Adeptus Astartes. Los Astartes de esta legión son maestros de los ataques relámpago y una de las fuerzas de élite del Imperium. La furia divina que su progenitor les ha otorgado transforma a las tropas de asalto del capítulo en verdaderos Ángeles de Venganza, que aplastan sin piedad alguna a los enemigos del Imperium.
languages.original_text: One of the most illustrious Chapters in the Adeptus Astartes. Masters of lightning-fast, powerful attacks, the Astartes of this legion are the elite strike force of the Imperium. The divine fury bestowed upon these Astartes by their progenitor transforms the Chapter's assault troops into true angels of vengeance, mercilessly crushing the enemies of the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: Uno de los capítulos más ilustres del Adeptus Astartes. Los Astartes de esta legión son maestros de los ataques relámpago y una de las fuerzas de élite del Imperium. La furia divina que su progenitor les ha otorgado transforma a las tropas de asalto del capítulo en verdaderos Ángeles de Venganza, que aplastan sin piedad alguna a los enemigos del Imperium.

languages.text: 阿斯塔特修会中最负盛名的战团之一。这支阿斯塔特战团精通闪电般迅猛而凌厉的突击，堪称帝国的精锐突击力量。元祖所赐予的神圣之怒，将战团的突击部队化为真正的复仇天使，毫不留情地粉碎帝国之敌。
languages.original_text: One of the most illustrious Chapters in the Adeptus Astartes. Masters of lightning-fast, powerful attacks, the Astartes of this legion are the elite strike force of the Imperium. The divine fury bestowed upon these Astartes by their progenitor transforms the Chapter's assault troops into true angels of vengeance, mercilessly crushing the enemies of the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: 阿斯塔特修会中最负盛名的战团之一。这支阿斯塔特战团精通闪电般迅猛而凌厉的突击，堪称帝国的精锐突击力量。元祖所赐予的神圣之怒，将战团的突击部队化为真正的复仇天使，毫不留情地粉碎帝国之敌。

languages.text: L'un des chapitres les plus illustres de l'Adeptus Astartes. Capables de puissantes attaques à la rapidité foudroyante, les guerriers de cette légion représentent la force de frappe d'élite de l'Imperium. La furie divine conférée à ces guerriers par leur géniteur transforme ces troupes d'assaut en véritables anges de la vengeance, qui exterminent sans pitié les ennemis de l'Imperium.
languages.original_text: One of the most illustrious Chapters in the Adeptus Astartes. Masters of lightning-fast, powerful attacks, the Astartes of this legion are the elite strike force of the Imperium. The divine fury bestowed upon these Astartes by their progenitor transforms the Chapter's assault troops into true angels of vengeance, mercilessly crushing the enemies of the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: L'un des chapitres les plus illustres de l'Adeptus Astartes. languages.text: Adeptus Astartes'in en şanlı Tümenlerinden biri. Yıldırım hızında, etkili hücumların üstadı olan bu lejyonun Astartesleri, İmparatorluk'un seçkin saldırı kuvvetidir. Ataları tarafından bu Astarteslere bahşedilen ilahi öfke, Tümen'in taarruz askerlerini gerçek birer intikam meleğine dönüştürerek İmparatorluk düşmanlarını acımasızca ezip geçer.
languages.original_text: One of the most illustrious Chapters in the Adeptus Astartes. Masters of lightning-fast, powerful attacks, the Astartes of this legion are the elite strike force of the Imperium. The divine fury bestowed upon these Astartes by their progenitor transforms the Chapter's assault troops into true angels of vengeance, mercilessly crushing the enemies of the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: Adeptus Astartes'in en şanlı Tümenlerinden biri. Yıldırım hızında, etkili hücumların üstadı olan bu lejyonun Astartesleri, İmparatorluk'un seçkin saldırı kuvvetidir. Ataları tarafından bu Astarteslere bahşedilen ilahi öfke, Tümen'in taarruz askerlerini gerçek birer intikam meleğine dönüştürerek İmparatorluk düşmanlarını acımasızca ezip geçer.

languages.text: アスタテスの最も栄光ある章の一つ。電光石火の強力な攻撃を得意とするこのレギオンのスターテスは、帝国の精鋭部隊である。この章の祖先が授けた神聖なる怒りは、この章の攻撃部隊を真の復讐の天使に変え、帝国の敵を容赦なく粉砕する。
languages.original_text: One of the most illustrious Chapters in the Adeptus Astartes. Masters of lightning-fast, powerful attacks, the Astartes of this legion are the elite strike force of the Imperium. The divine fury bestowed upon these Astartes by their progenitor transforms the Chapter's assault troops into true angels of vengeance, mercilessly crushing the enemies of the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: アスタテスの最も栄光ある章の一つ。電光石火の強力な攻撃を得意とするこのレギオンのスターテスは、帝国の精鋭部隊である。この章の祖先が授けた神聖なる怒りは、この章の攻撃部隊を真の復讐の天使に変え、帝国の敵を容赦なく粉砕する。

languages.text: Eines der glanzvollsten Kapitel des Adeptus Astartes. Als Meister blitzschneller, mächtiger Angriffe sind die Astartes dieser Legion die Elite-Kampftruppe des Imperiums. Der göttliche Zorn, mit dem diese Astartes von ihrem Stammvater belegt wurden, macht aus den Sturmtruppen des Kapitels wahre Engel der Vergeltung, die ohne Gnade alle Feinde des Imperiums zerschmettern.

The divine fury bestowed upon these Astartes by their progenitor transforms the Chapter's assault troops into true angels of vengeance, mercilessly crushing the enemies of the Imperium.
